name: Iguana Elbow Hold - Straddle No Hands 1

items: one shoulder, same side elbow, same side arm, back/shoulder, glutes (optional), head (optional)
one arm is holding the pole behind the body at the elbow, the other arm is in a fixed position of choice with no contact with the pole
both legs are fully extended in straddle position, and on same side of the pole as the body
